payload.answer: The time reference is ambiguous. I can help you resolve it by choosing how to interpret “last Friday” and “next month.”
citations: Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.
repair_options: Keep the statement as-is with the relative time references unchanged.
Convert “last Friday” to the specific calendar date once you provide the reference date for the statement.
Convert “next month” to a specific month once you provide the reference date for the statement.
Store both time references separately as quoted/relative information without resolving them.
Ask Sam for a precise departure date before recording anything durable.
